items.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
items.dek: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.
items.body: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Forget AI. Pigeons Can Spot Some Cancers as Well as Human Experts
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
items.dek: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.
items.body: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.
items.author: IriLine Desk
